data.title: Omnissa excels in Gartner's Endpoint Management report, scoring 4.95 in Autonomous Use Case, "Leader" in Magic Quadrant 2026.
data.description: Omnissa, based in Mountain View, California, has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Unified Endpoint Management (UEM) Tools. The company achieved the highest ranking across all four Use Cases in the Gartner Critical Capabilities for Endpoint Management Tools report. In the Autonomous Endpoint Management Use Case, Omnissa scored 4.95 out of 5.0. This recognition has positioned Omnissa as a Leader in the Magic Quadrant report.

data.title: BZI® in Kanarraville, Utah, celebrates exceptional impact in 2025 on revenue growth, performance, innovations, and community.
data.description: In Kanarraville, Utah, BZI® is celebrating significant milestones in 2025. The company has achieved a remarkable revenue increase and substantial growth in its customer base. In addition, BZI® has excelled in performance, introduced innovative products, received recognition in the industry, fostered a strong company culture, and made valuable contributions to the community. These accomplishments highlight the success and impact of BZI® as it continues to thrive.

data.title: Altitude Marketing's 2026 CDMO Marketing Trends Report surveys 149 leaders on growth, budgets, and agency partners.
data.description: Altitude Marketing from Emmaus, Pennsylvania, recently unveiled its latest findings in the 2026 CDMO Marketing Trends Report. The report is based on a survey conducted with 149 industry leaders, focusing on aspects such as growth projections, budget allocations, and the uptick in collaboration with agency partners.

data.title: CoreSite introduces 400G AWS Direct Connect in Chicago for improved cloud and AI performance, catering to high-bandwidth needs.
data.description: In Chicago, CoreSite has introduced a new 400G AWS Direct Connect service. This offering aims to provide efficient and fast connectivity for AI and business operations, promising high bandwidth and low latency.

data.title: Keysight unveils Machine Learning Toolkit for rapid Device Modeling, PDK Development, reducing time-to-market, enabling faster Co-Optimization.
data.description: In Santa Rosa, California, a company is utilizing Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning to speed up the development of Design Technology Co-Optimization. This innovative modeling approach is cutting down the time-to-market significantly, allowing for quicker progress in the development process.

data.title: Iran's crypto market hits $7.78B with IRGC controlling 50% of activity. Bitcoin withdrawals spike during protests.
data.description: According to data from Chainalysis, the cryptocurrency ecosystem in Iran reached a value of $7.78 billion in the year 2025. A significant portion of this activity, specifically 50%, is controlled by addresses linked to the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC). The country experienced a surge in Bitcoin withdrawals during periods of protests.

data.title: BÉIS launches Pro Collection, designed for men, with actor Tyriq Withers as face. LOS ANGELES, Jan. 15, 2026.
data.description: Renowned travel brand BÉIS has enlisted actor Tyriq Withers for its inaugural male-led campaign. The Pro Collection is set to debut in January 2026, marking the brand's expansion into the male market. Tyriq Withers will be the face of this new collection, adding a fresh perspective to the brand's already popular range of products. Los Angeles-based BÉIS continues to grow its influence, and this move illustrates their commitment to appealing to a wider audience. The campaign is a strategic step to tap into the growing demand from male customers, and with the launch set for January, excitement is building around this latest venture.

data.title: Jon Sica promoted to President of Batteries Plus to drive B2B and franchise growth. HARTLAND, Wis., Jan. 15, 2026.
data.description: A skilled executive has been promoted to guide the future expansion, evolution, and artificial intelligence integration at Batteries Plus. The company revealed on January 15, 2026 that Jon Sica has been elevated to the position from Chief Operating Officer. Batteries Plus is renowned as the foremost battery and power solutions service center in the nation.

data.title: NODAR introduces software-only 3D perception products for any camera platform, previously available in kits.
data.description: NODAR, based in Concord, Mass., has introduced its software-only 3D perception products, known for ultra-wide-baseline stereo vision in autonomous systems. The company is making its patented stereo vision algorithms accessible through the NODAR SDK for the first time, after being exclusively available through integrated development kits. This move allows OEMs and developers to assess, incorporate, and utilize long-range 3D perception technology.

data.title: Peloton and Respin Health collaboration improves menopausal symptoms, with 84% seeing improvement in 60-day program.
data.description: A recent program spanning 60 days resulted in an 84% improvement in symptoms for a specific group of women. Peloton, a prominent name in connected fitness, partnered with Respin Health, known for its personalized and holistic platform, for this initiative. The positive outcome showcases the effectiveness of the program in addressing the participants' health concerns.

data.title: Gold production plateauing, depletion outpacing discovery, $5,000 pivot predicted by 2026, Lake Victoria Gold Ltd. involved.
data.description: Lake Victoria Gold Ltd. has released a statement highlighting the current status of global mined gold production. According to the report, there is a noticeable trend towards a definitive plateau in gold production worldwide. This is primarily due to the depletion of aging gold assets, which is surpassing the rate of new discoveries being made. With this shift, the industry is facing a challenge as the supply of gold is constrained while demand remains steady. This development emphasizes the importance of strategic planning and exploration efforts in the gold mining sector.

data.title: Tuukka Paavola named CFO of Bioretec Ltd., effective Jan 20, 2025. Company announcement on Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: Bioretec Ltd made an announcement on January 15, 2026, at 5:30 p.m. EET in Tampere, Finland. The company, known for its absorbable orthopedic implants, has appointed Tuukka Paavola, who holds a Master of Science in Industrial Engineering and a CFA designation, as its Chief Financial Officer. Paavola is set to assume the role starting from January 20, 2025.

data.title: Smart Fleet Management Market projected to reach USD 798.5 Billion by 2032, growing at 6.90% CAGR, as companies embrace AI and telematics for cost reduction.
data.description: The Smart Fleet Management Market is experiencing growth as more logistics companies, ride-hailing operators, and commercial fleet owners utilize AI-enabled telematics, real-time vehicle tracking, and predictive maintenance systems. This trend aims to lower fuel expenses and minimize vehicle downtime. Nonetheless, concerns regarding data privacy are emerging in this sector.

data.title: Patten Properties selling final 30 Airpark Homesites at Pecan Plantation near Dallas-Fort Worth. Fast-selling fly-in community.
data.description: The Landings Airpark located at Pecan Plantation in close proximity to Dallas-Fort Worth is approaching a complete sellout as there is a growing demand for residential plots with air access and resort-style living. Recently, on January 15, 2026, The Landings at Pecan Plantation, one of the swiftly selling fly-in neighborhoods in the country, revealed...
